blocks.content:
# Synthetic Test Fixture: Always Fails

This guide is a deterministic test fixture for the E2E CLI and orchestration layer. It contains one passing step followed by one mandatory step that targets a nonexistent element, guaranteeing a predictable failure.
Step 1: Highlight the Dashboards nav item. This step passes to establish a baseline.
blocks.tooltip: Deterministic pass — confirms the guide loaded and the CLI can execute steps.

blocks.content: Step 2: Click a nonexistent element. This step always fails because the target cannot be found.
blocks.tooltip: Deterministic failure — the selector does not match any element in the DOM.
